name: dosage-builder
title: Dosage Builder
description: Structured sig builder (dose, route, frequency, PRN) that assembles a canonical sig and English string.

props.name: value / defaultValue
props.description: Controlled/uncontrolled sig parts: { amount, unit, route, frequency, prn, indication }.

props.name: onValueChange
props.description: Fires with the sig parts plus the assembled `text` and a `complete` flag.

clinicalNotes: Build the sig from structured parts, not free text — free-text sigs are a known error source. The assembled English sig ('1 tab PO TDS PRN pain') is shown back for verification. A PRN order requires an indication field: an as-needed order without a reason is incomplete, and the field flags it. The `complete` flag lets the caller gate ordering until every required part is present.
notes: Round-2 form component; composes field + input + select + toggle-group + switch + label + tooltip and reuses route-of-administration-field. Frequency abbreviations carry a tooltip with the full meaning (aria-label as fallback).
